nasb.text: “Then the kingdom of heaven will be comparable to ten virgins, who took their lamps and went out to meet the bridegroom.

esv.text: “Then the kingdom of heaven will be like     ten virgins who took their lamps    and went to meet the bridegroom.

cnv.text: “那時，天國好像十個童女，拿著她們的燈出去迎接新郎。

ccb.text: “那时，天国就像十个伴娘提着灯去迎接新郎，

csbs.text: “那时，天国好比十个童女，拿着她们的灯出去迎接新郎    。
